programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep05
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep06
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep07
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Shell Girl
programme.desc: Upon waking up in a laboratory, a girl finds that she has gained superior fighting skills but lost her memory. Hunted by an unknown man, she has to save herself & rediscover her identity.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep11
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep12
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep06
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep07
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep21
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep22
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: City of the City Ep03
programme.desc: A story of two generations navigating financial storms and ethical dilemmas in the cutthroat world of finance. From executives to employees, it explores moral choices amid money-driven ambitions.

programme.title: City of the City Ep04
programme.desc: A story of two generations navigating financial storms and ethical dilemmas in the cutthroat world of finance. From executives to employees, it explores moral choices amid money-driven ambitions.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep29
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep01
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep02
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: The Strange Beast Of Silent Island
programme.desc: Married couple Ye Bo Ming and Yi Lin are engaged in aquaculture on a remote island. During her cousin's visit, a strange bloodthirsty beast trapped in a mine is accidentally released.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep01
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.
